company.name: ADNOC
company.legalName: Abu Dhabi National Oil Company P.J.S.C.
company.dashboardBasis: Public proxy view for ADNOC Group
company.proxyEntity: ADNOC Gas PLC for continuous financial dashboards; ADNOC listed-company portfolio for group-level reference rows

coverage.availabilityNote: ADNOC P.J.S.C. does not publish a stable ten-year consolidated group annual report in the reviewed public sources. The dashboard therefore uses ADNOC Gas PLC as the closest official continuous proxy for revenue, net income, cash flow, capex and cash; 2026-2028 forecast values are third-party analyst estimates.

profitability.subtitle: Million USD (Nominal)

groupPortfolioReference.basis: ADNOC Group six listed portfolio companies combined
ADNOC Group six listed portfolio companies combined

definitions.definition: ADNOC Gas adjusted revenues include proportionate consolidation of joint ventures where disclosed; group-portfolio rows are combined revenue of ADNOC's six listed companies.
Profit for the year / net income. 2026-2028 dashboard values are third-party analyst forecasts where full-year official forecasts are unavailable.

For dashboard actuals, ADNOC Gas adjusted cash flow from operations is used where the company presents it as part of the financial review; FY2025 uses net cash flows generated from operating activities.
Company-defined or standard free cash flow, depending on source availability. The Excel workbook records the basis by row; forecast years use MarketScreener cash-flow forecasts.
Capital expenditure/investments shown as positive bars in the dashboard and as negative outflows in the normalized metrics table.
Cash and cash equivalents at year end when available from the financial statements.
Net increase/decrease in cash and cash equivalents.

sources.title: World Benchmarking Alliance - Abu Dhabi National Oil Company profile
sources.notes: Used for disclosure-gap context: WBA notes ADNOC did not publish reports online or report key data in its benchmark profile.

sources.title: ADNOC Gas Annual Report 2023
sources.notes: Financial review tables for 2022 and 2023 adjusted revenues, net income, adjusted cash flow from operations, adjusted capex, free cash flow, and year-end cash.

sources.title: ADNOC Gas Integrated Report 2024
sources.notes: Financial review table for 2023 and 2024 revenue, adjusted net income, adjusted cash flow from operations, adjusted capex, free cash flow, and cash-flow statement values.

sources.title: ADNOC Gas Q4 and FY 2025 MD&A
sources.notes: FY2025 revenue, EBITDA, net income, capex, cash-flow statement, cash balance, 2026 sales-volume and investment guidance.

sources.title: ADNOC Gas Q1 2026 results press release
sources.notes: Q1 2026 net income, free cash flow, cash balance, 2026 net income guidance range, 2029 EBITDA growth target, and 5% annual dividend growth policy to 2030.

sources.title: ADNOC Gas Q3 2024 results and strategy update
sources.notes: Updated growth strategy: over 40% EBITDA growth target by 2029 and up to USD15bn capex for 2025-2029.

sources.title: MarketScreener - ADNOC Gas PLC financial forecasts
sources.notes: Third-party analyst forecast values for 2026-2028 projected income statement and cash-flow forecast.

sources.title: WAM - ADNOC listed companies 2024 combined results
sources.notes: Six ADNOC listed companies reported combined 2024 revenue of USD49.7bn, EBITDA of USD16.0bn, and net profit above USD9.0bn.

sources.title: WAM - ADNOC listed companies 2025 combined results
sources.notes: Six ADNOC listed companies reported 2025 revenue of USD51.8bn, EBITDA of USD16.7bn, and net profit of USD9.7bn.

sources.title: ADNOC listed companies dividend target to 2030
sources.notes: ADNOC listed companies target USD43bn in dividends from 2025 to 2030; ADNOC Gas dividend target USD24.4bn through 2030.
